title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Law, Unknown person #6 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shock while!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The hell is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Bugeeh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KOFF!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what happens when you charge in half-cooked...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WARP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: shall we return to the ship, commodore?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be an idiot! We finish what we start!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KOFF!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Blackbeard's here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do ALL your officers have devil fruit powers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ZEE HAH.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Must be a pretty raw deal, hauling around so many anchors!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They call 'em Devil Fruits for a reason!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That weakness is well worth the trade-off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GWAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're Attackin' from below!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The bastards are tryin' to sink us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who knew they were so strong underwater?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...we might be takin' a poundin' now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they'll be history soon! The Commodore's the strongest around!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama's gonna make you eat those words if she's still alive....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hiya ha ha! You realize we're fighting her killer now, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: New Eras only happen when the old legends are torn down!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
